author: CasaOS Team
description: The developer-friendly cloud platform for building and running LLM agents for AI-native applications.
tagline: The developer-friendly cloud platform for building and running LLM agents for AI-native applications.
release_notes:
- v0.3.0 adds Markdown rendering and image uploads in Playground.
- An OpenAI-compatible chat completions API was introduced for LLM tasks and agent invocations.
- Inference and Plugin services were open sourced, with fixes for Gemini function error logs, wildcard model inference, Docker Compose server versioning, and UI navigation/search.
title: TaskingAI
